marketRegime.summary: VIX is moderate at 18.7, SPY trend is mildly supportive, and shock-day risk is off.
marketRegime.insight: System Insight: Multiple entry-grade setups available; prioritize clean entries over extended momentum.

caution: No live sector overlay; use price action to confirm.

historical.cohortLabel: Based on similar setups over the last 90 days

decisionContext.translation: Higher-priority setup with a clean enough entry profile.
executionEdge: Spread and liquidity snapshot support cleaner fills.
No live sector overlay, so price action matters more than backdrop.
RSI 50.9 stays below the late-extension zone.
invalidation: Skip if price moves more than 3% above the snapshot before entry.
Skip if RSI pushes into the 68-70 rejection zone before entry.
Skip if spread or liquidity deteriorates on the live chain.

expectation.baseCase: Orderly continuation if the trend and liquidity stay intact.
expectation.risk: The edge weakens if momentum cools and sector support fades.

caution: No live sector overlay; use price action to confirm.
OTM structure: avoid paying up if move is already extended.

unfavorable: Avoid if the move does not start quickly (decay).
